column1: Hey alyssa, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
hey it's Spiffy with SpringBreak U checkin in. lmk which week your spring break is and I'll send the options we have avail for that week
yoo alyssa, ain't hear back from you in a while wanted to make sure you're good. you still lookin for help with spring break plans?
Whats up Alyssa its Spiffy with Spring Break U, saw you filled the form on our site. Were you lookin for help with spring break for this year still, or next?

I actually have a question about the party package, we already have a booking at Occidental Punta Cana for next week but we're interested in the party package you guys offer, is there a way to buy that separately?
yea we can do that. which dates will you be staying at the occ punta cana
We will be there from March 4-8. What are the pricing options?
hey sorry I missed this, but I can send over the pricing for that, whats the best email for you?
hey pardon the delay but i just sent that over, lmk if you got it
Yes I got it! Does it book up in advance or can we purchase at anytime?
things have been moving quickly so yes I would recommend purchasing asap. let me know and I'll set up the reservation!
Can we book Coco Bongo for 5 people on Friday 3/6?
yea! Coco bongo is on Wednesday the 4th your week though
Is that the only day we could do, or the only days it's open?
thats the only day we have scheduled that fits within your travel dates. youre the 4th to the 8th right
Yes! Is Imagine available on the 6th or the 7th?
What time would the transportation to Coco bongo be on the 4th
Yea there will be transportation included, and Maroca is at the moment the 9th but you would be leaving the day before
you kinda arrive in between the end of the 1st week and beginning of the 2nd week
How can we book Coco bongo on the 4th?
ill set up the link and send it over! 5 of you right?
cool will send this in a sec
hey btw which resort will you be staying on?
The due date was yesterday, will it charge us an extra cost? Also is it okay if a few of us book it tomorrow
all good ill update it for tomorrow
Is there a reason why these spots say temporarily reserved?
I know I got my payment confirmation and the other two people haven't reserved their spot yet
Where can we find info about transportation and other details for tomorrow night?
hey whats up, will email you everything rn
We will get to the resort at 4:15 and have to check in, will we have enough time to pick up the vouchers?
We just got to the resort and were told that Coco bongo is on Thursday, you told me it was on Wednesday so we are a little confused
Hey, they must've just adjusted the schedule on site. Will check in to confirm
You cool with going tomorrow if so?
Hey yes coco is tomorrow on site staff lmk you came by
Have fun tomorrow tho, I'll be there Friday
Hey we were just told our ride is getting here at 8:30, is that correct? Our vouchers says 8
Was it the on site staff that told you 8:30?
I would get down there early just to be safe, maybe grab a drink at the bar and keep an eye out
Someone from Coco bongo that was at the hotel told us tha
I would follow what's on the voucher. Def stick to the direction our Go Blue staff gives you
If you're not too sure just head down there and ask them
